translation.en: This painting has a beautiful feature.

exampleSentences: Cô giáo hướng dẫn em cách viết từng nét trong chữ Hán.
Bức tranh này có nhiều nét vẽ rất tinh tế và đẹp mắt.
Anh thích ngắm nhìn những nét đặc biệt trên khuôn mặt của em.

definitions.vi: Một đường hoặc nét vẽ xác định hình dạng hoặc đường viền của một cái gì đó.
definitions.en: A line or stroke that defines the shape or outline of something.
definitions.es: Una línea o trazo que define la forma o contorno de algo.

example.en: This painting has many beautiful features.
example.vi: Bức tranh này có nhiều nét đẹp.
example.es: Esta pintura tiene muchas características hermosas.

notes:
Nét means a stroke — one line made by a pen or brush. It’s also used for a feature or a small visible detail.

As a noun, you can say một nét, những nét, often in phrases like nét chữ (handwriting stroke), nét vẽ (drawing line), nét mặt (facial feature), đường nét (contours/lines). It often highlights something small but noticeable.

It can also mean a slight trace of something, like a hint of emotion or character (một nét buồn, nét riêng).

Think of it as one small line → then extend that idea to one small detail or distinguishing feature.
exampleSentencesTranslated: The teacher guides me how to write each stroke in Chinese characters.
This painting has many strokes that are very delicate and beautiful.
I like to look at the special strokes on your face.
notes_md:
**Nét** means a *stroke* — one line made by a pen or brush. It’s also used for a *feature* or a small visible detail.

As a noun, you can say *một nét*, *những nét*, often in phrases like *nét chữ* (handwriting stroke), *nét vẽ* (drawing line), *nét mặt* (facial feature), *đường nét* (contours/lines). It often highlights something small but noticeable.

It can also mean a slight trace of something, like a hint of emotion or character (*một nét buồn*, *nét riêng*).

Think of it as one small line → then extend that idea to one small detail or distinguishing feature.

translation.en: This painting has a beautiful feature.
